obligations.rule: Ensure `assertString` is called and handles non-string inputs correctly.
obligations.why: The function relies on `assertString` to validate the input type.

obligations.rule: Test the `provider` option when it matches a valid provider in the `cards` object.
obligations.why: The function has a branch for validating against a specific provider.

obligations.rule: Test the `provider` option when it does not match any provider in the `cards` object.
obligations.why: The function throws an error for invalid providers.

obligations.rule: Test the case where no `provider` is specified and the card matches one of the `allCards` patterns.
obligations.why: The function defaults to checking all card patterns when no provider is specified.

obligations.rule: Test the case where no `provider` is specified and the card does not match any `allCards` patterns.
obligations.why: The function must return false if no patterns match.

obligations.rule: Ensure the `isLuhnValid` helper is called and its result is respected.
obligations.why: The function relies on `isLuhnValid` for the final validation step.

obligations.rule: Test the sanitization of input by removing spaces and dashes.
obligations.why: The function explicitly sanitizes input before validation.

test_groups.title: Input type validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensure `assertString` correctly validates the input type.

test_groups.title: Specific provider validation
test_groups.rationale: Test behavior when a valid provider is specified in the options.

test_groups.title: Invalid provider error
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the function throws an error for invalid providers.

test_groups.title: Default provider validation
test_groups.rationale: Test behavior when no provider is specified and the card matches or does not match any patterns.

test_groups.title: Luhn algorithm validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the `isLuhnValid` helper is called and its result is respected.

test_groups.title: Input sanitization
test_groups.rationale: Test the sanitization of input by removing spaces and dashes.
